results.text: Chase Reid – 2026 NHL Draft Prospect Profile - The Hockey Writers. When he was playing in the North American Hockey League (NAHL) a season ago, nobody would’ve dreamed of ranking Chase Reid as the top defenseman for the 2026 NHL Draft. Now, he might have a... Chase Reid - Wikipedia. Chase Reid (born December 30, 2007) is an American ice hockey player who is a defenseman for the Sault Ste. Marie Greyhounds of the Ontario Hockey League (OHL). He is considered a top prospect eligible for the 2026 NHL entry draft.
